def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Part 1: -1 * sign((close - delay(close, 7)) + delta(close, 7))
    close_lag7 = delay(pl.col('close'), periods=7)
    close_delta7 = delta(pl.col('close'), periods=7)
    inner = (pl.col('close') - close_lag7) + close_delta7
    part1 = -1 * inner.sign()

    # Part 2: 1 + rank(1 + sum(returns, 250))
    returns_sum_250 = rolling_sum(pl.col('returns'), window=250)
    part2 = 1 + rank(returns_sum_250 + 1).over('date')

    # Combine
    factor = part1 * part2

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
